state.coderResponse:
All deliverables are in place and every validation gate passes. Implementation complete.

## Summary

I implemented **PRP P1.M5.T3.S1** — the keystone `config.Load()` entry point that resolves the full FR34 precedence chain.

### Deliverables created

1. **`internal/config/load.go`** — plain `package config` line (config.go keeps the doc). Exports:
   - `Flags{Env, Flag FlagsLayer}` + `FlagsLayer` (6 pointer fields, the `STAGEHAND_*` surface)
   - `Load(flags Flags, repoDir string) (cfg Config, reg *provider.Registry, trustNotice string, err error)` — applies the 7-layer chain (Default → global file → repo file → git-config → env → flag), per-key shallow-merges `ProviderOverrides`, builds the registry via `provider.NewRegistry(provider.Builtins(), cfg.ProviderOverrides)`, and emits the exact §19 trust notice gated to repo-local sources.
   - Helpers: `resolvedConfigPath` (flag>env), `applyOverlay`, `applyFlagsLayer`, `mergeProviderOverrides`, `overlayHasContent`.
   - Imports **only** `fmt`, `time`, `internal/provider` — no `internal/git` (one-way edge preserved).

2. **`internal/config/load_test.go`** — white-box (`package config`), reuses `file_test.go` helpers (no testify). 12 tests covering: defaults-only, full precedence chain (each level beats below), flag>env, provider field-merge over built-ins, per-key shallow merge, all four trust-notice scenarios, `--config` discovery override (incl. flag>env path and git-config still applying), present-but-zero, and ConfigPath diagnostics.

3. **`docs/CONFIGURATION.md`** — Mode A config-reference surface: 7-level precedence, 6 env vars (FR35), `stagehand.*` git-config keys (§16.3 + `--bool` note), `.stagehand.toml` keys (§16.2 golden), field-merge rule, §19 trust notice.

### Validation results
- **L1**: `go build`/`go vet`/`gofmt -l` all clean
- **L2/L3**: `go test ./internal/config/ -v` and `go test ./...` all green (no regressions)
- **L4**: exact §19 trust-notice string present; no `internal/git` substring; imports only fmt/time/provider; docs exists with all 6 sections

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "Implemented P1.M5.T3.S1 config.Load(). Created internal/config/load.go (Flags/FlagsLayer + Load applying the full FR34 chain, per-key shallow provider-override merge, registry built via NewRegistry(Builtins(), overrides), §19 repo-local trust notice; plain package line; imports only fmt/time/internal/provider — no internal/git). Created internal/config/load_test.go (white-box, 12 tests reusing file_test.go helpers covering precedence, flag>env, field-merge, per-key shallow merge, all trust-notice scenarios, --config discovery override, present-but-zero, ConfigPath). Created docs/CONFIGURATION.md (Mode A: 7-level precedence, 6 STAGEHAND_* env vars, stagehand.* git-config keys, .stagehand.toml keys, field-merge rule, §19 notice). All gates pass: go build/vet/gofmt clean, go test ./internal/config/ -v green, go test ./... green (no regressions), exact trust-notice string present, no internal/git import."
}
```
